steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify all 7 dependency tasks (t0008, t0012, t0015-t0019) are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure, code/ and assets/library subdirs.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review papers in t0015-t0019 surveys for on-the-path shunting, AIS channel split, E-I temporal co-tuning priors.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Look up NEURON conventions for spatially-targeted synapses, moving-bar drivers, and forsec channel-modular layouts.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Read t0008 modeldb_189347_dsgc and t0020 modeldb_189347_dsgc_gabamod source to identify reusable HOC/MOD skeleton and driver-extension points.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan.md covering driver design, channel-modular AIS layout, 12-angle moving-bar protocol, scoring, and verification criteria.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: task is local-only on the Windows workstation per task description.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build modeldb_189347_dsgc_dendritic library asset: HOC/MOD files with channel-modular AIS, moving-bar driver, run 12-angle x >=10-trial sweep, save tuning_curves.csv and score_report.json.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were used.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: task is a focused code-reproduction with explicit method spec; not in code-reproduction optional_steps list.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md (with comparison vs t0008 and t0020), metrics.json, costs.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare DSI / peak / HWHM to Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016 paper envelope and other DSGC literature.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json identifying follow-up channel-swap experiments enabled by this testbed.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final verification pass and PR preparation.
